title: National Energy System Operator framework document
body: "Framework document detailing the broad governance framework within which the National Energy System Operator (NESO) and the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) operate. This includes:    NESO’s core responsibilities the governance and accountability framework that applies between the roles of the department, NESO and UK Government Investments (UKGI) how the day-to-day relationship works in practice   "
